rule_description: iPhone 16 order from P2 track with 180-minute delay
More than 3 orders from same email within 30 minutes
More than 5 orders from same IP within 1 hour
More than 4 orders from same device within 1 hour
Same email used by multiple user IDs
Three or more orders within five minutes
More than five orders to same address within 24 hours
Same user switches devices within 30 minutes
